known_gap: The official County index identifies a primary argument against Measure D at https://files.santaclaracounty.gov/exjcpb1296/2026-03/ballot-measure-agument-form_against_redactedv2.pdf?VersionId=zy0WA89IW0rDm2THz.NC87iHCT0QZeM7. On 2026-07-11, the County file host returned 403 to automated retrieval, and the document viewer could not fetch the file. It is deliberately not in this queue and remains an evidence gap until the reviewer can obtain and verify the exact official artifact.
